message:
test(core): add btrfs FsOps integration test

Added comprehensive integration test for btrfs filesystem operations:
- open_fs_btrfs_fsops_getattr_lookup_readdir_read test validates:
  - VFS inode 1 mapping to btrfs root_dir_objectid
  - Root directory attributes (kind=Directory, perm=0o755)
  - File lookup (hello.txt with correct ino, size=22)
  - Full readdir (., .., hello.txt entries)
  - Offset pagination (skip . and .. with offset=2)

Uses TestDevice with synthetic btrfs image for deterministic testing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
